title: Enhanced Turtle Items (ETI)
description: Enhanced Turtle Items (ETI) is a Minecraft mod that adds enhanced turtle items in the style of netherite tool making
body:
[(Also on CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eti)  

Enhanced Turtle Items (ETI) is a Minecraft mod that adds enhanced turtle items in the style of netherite tool making

 

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3xIzvzCc/images/328943e50f6847cb4ef90fac3a6d18a5e94625d0.png)

You can craft a turtle ingot by using this recipe

![this is how the turtle ingot is currently crafted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3xIzvzCc/images/84d9a89601d4f4779637e339011586475ea07577.png)  
  
 
Want to join a Minecraft modding discord community or just want support for this mod, join [https://discord.gg/7uC27yjMaS](https://discord.gg/7uC27yjMaS) !

  
  

Currently, only some vanilla items can be enhanced by using a turtle ingot, mod support will be soon
